text.title: GraphQL Resolver Implementation
text.summary: Python/Strawberry resolver patterns: DataLoader per-request context, mutation error handling, subscription generators.

rule.statement: Create a typed context dataclass per request containing `current_user_id`, `loaders`, and `services`. Pass it to every resolver via `info.context`.
rule.rationale: Resolver isolation requires all dependencies to flow through context, not module-level globals. A per-request context prevents cross-request state pollution (especially DataLoaders which must not be shared).

section.title: DataLoader Integration

rule.statement: Instantiate DataLoaders in the per-request context factory. Each request gets its own loader instances so batching is scoped to the request lifecycle.
rule.rationale: A process-level DataLoader accumulates keys from all concurrent requests, producing incorrect results by mixing data across users and requests.

section.reference: Strawberry DataLoader batch_load_fn with key-to-result mapping
